source.title: How To Attack Freezer and Laundry on Oregon (Basement) - Rainbow Six Siege
source.notes: This video is a single dedicated strategy, not a full site-by-site walkthrough: it covers ONE alternate execute onto the Basement site (Ebox/Laundry/Freezer) via Freezer/Laundry rather than the standard Blue-door push. Only this one site/plan is covered; Top Floor and Meeting/Kitchen attacks are not discussed. Room/callout names are the creator's informal ones. Auto-generated captions badly mangled two operator names throughout ('ab Banner'/'a Banner'/'Havana'/'abana'/'haban' and 'Capal'/'Capow'/'Capao') — resolved with high confidence from gadget context (see notes below). One additional operator name ('doabe') could not be confidently resolved and is flagged as unconfirmed. Rewrite pass: reliable top-down blueprint grounding for Oregon could not be obtained (Ubisoft, r6maps.com, Liquipedia, bo3.gg, and siege.gg either returned no renderable blueprint content or blocked automated fetches, and no browser was available to render the interactive map tools) — compass directions have been omitted from all locations in this file rather than guessed; locations use room/feature names only.

gadgetPlacements.location: Small Tower Drone Hole / Kitchen Tray
gadgetPlacements.note: Pre-place a drone here (or behind the tin/bucket near the drone hole) at the start of the round. Watch the double door and the corridor. Leave it here through the whole setup phase.
Jump the drone onto the desk, then the gray cabinet, then the wooden cabinet, and leave it up there. Reveals anyone flanking down Main stairs and sees the Meeting double door.
Drone placement watching the Freezer flank, Top White, Security flank, and the Zulu/Z angle, plus sight into Dining.
Source audio also named an operator phonetically as 'doabe' for this spot — doesn't match a real Attack-side operator, treat as unconfirmed. Gridlock is the confirmed pick.
After securing the White Stairs cutoff window, throw Trax Stingers on White Stairs or Zulu. Drop a second to cover both, and another behind you once Freezer is taken.
Pre-placed drone spot — sees both Split doors, the top Meeting door, and the hatch. Left here for intel through the execute.
Drone left here to watch for anyone coming up the tower stairs; pairs with a Gridlock Trax Stinger thrown from the same spot.
Opens the Blue door barricade and the Meeting hatch early as a decoy to bait defenders into setting up around Blue/Ebox/Elbow/Pillar while the real push goes through Freezer.
Hard-breach once Capitão has smoked off the head holes covering it — don't hard-breach into an un-smoked head hole.
Fire a flame bolt into the kill box/Laundry box area and onto the Freezer box so nobody can stand there. Flame bolts hit the wall and drop to the floor — aim accordingly.

Smoke off the rotate and the Highway door with crossbow smoke bolts, aimed about halfway up the wall. Only two smokes available — choose between the cross/rotate angle and the Highway door if you can't cover both.
Two players needed to watch the Ebox head holes and the rotate simultaneously. Hold from a tucked position further back rather than pushing all the way up.
Holds the Highway cutoff/rotate off once the wall is open, watching for defenders repositioning for an angle.

Fifth operator hangs back near Green, either pushing down late for a pick on Highway once the fight is loud elsewhere, or dropping the hatch. Source audio was unclear on the exact operator — treat as a flex pick.

operatorRecommendations.note: Opens the Blue door and Meeting hatch as a decoy first, then hard-breaches the Freezer reinforced wall after Capitão smokes the head holes, then holds the Highway cutoff.
Crossbow flame bolts deny the Freezer box/kill box; smoke bolts cover the rotate/cross and the Highway door.
Holds the White Stairs window cutoff, then Trax Stingers to lock down White Stairs/Zulu.
Takes Small Tower/Dining/Shower control at the start, later helps hold the Ebox head holes and rotate post-breach.
Hangs near Green, either drops the hatch or pushes down late for free kills on Highway once the main fight has drawn attention elsewhere.

generalTips.note: This plan avoids the standard Blue-door push. Enter via Freezer/Laundry instead.
Enter the building via Small Tower (preferred) or T3/top of the building.
Shoot the default camera in the kitchen (near Small Tower) immediately once you have control of that area.
Hold the White Stairs window cutoff for roughly 40-50 seconds while the two entry players secure Dining and Shower control.
Shoot down the front door barricade and the default camera there, then hold passively through the van windows watching Classroom, some of Garage, Bottom Main, and Zulu/Z for about 30-40 seconds.
Watch crossing from the Freezer/kill-box side toward the plant spot — defenders can hold an angle from behind the washing machine or the nearby wall.
At the bottom of the Freezer stairs, drone first and pre-fire the corner where defenders stand on the Freezer box.
Getting across the doorway from the kill-box area to the plant spot is near-impossible without Capitão's smoke coverage.
Rated more complex/coordinated than most single-site attack guides — use at least 3, ideally 4-5 players, and practice before ranked.
Still viable with only 3 players — split as two pushing Freezer and one holding Bottom Main.

Expect defender utility concentrated around the Blue door area (traps, banshees, ADS denial, possibly a mirror) since it's the most commonly expected push — the decoy hatch/door opening baits this out early.
